description: Lattice Logic shared dependency policy — ALL apps extend this (github>latticelogic/math-swipe//renovate-preset.json). One change here applies fleet-wide. Policy rationale: math-swipe docs/status.md 'Dependency policy'. Migrate to a dedicated latticelogic/renovate-config repo when the owner creates it (one-line extends change per app).

packageRules.description: One grouped PR per repo per cycle for minor+patch — verified by CI, merged promptly
Majors are deliberate migrations, never auto-proposed — they wait on the Dependency Dashboard until a human/agent ticks them
Native-shell deps ride device-QA build cycles, not calendar time — dashboard-approval even for minors
